title: Collective Framework: Reworked
description: A small continuation of bug fixes to Collective Framework
body:
##### This mod is a slight continuation branch for CollectiveFramework with small bug patches to help it better into mod packs. I am explicitly releasing this version due to some Forge Event handling issues that are created and in line with another mod of mine, CustomNPC+.

- You can find the original Collective Framework: [Original Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/collective-framework)
- See  [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-framework) for the 1.12 port:

#### **Changes:**

- ForgeEvent Handling Crash Fixes
- Math Handling Fixes (as Requested from GitHub)
- Bug / Optimization improvements

More patches to come as more report! Hope this helps! Essentialy, it a **NEW** version of the original Collective Framework mod and will always be backwards compatible with what the original mod can do and provide! 

----------------
